case_title: CUCALON DEBBIE CARE OF MCGUIRE REAL ESTATE VS CENTURY MEDIA NETWORK CO ATTN GOROGITZ ALEXANDER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,765.00 FILED BY CUCALON DEBBIE CARE OF MCGUIRE REAL ESTATE AS TO DEFENDANT CENTURY MEDIA NETWORK CO ATTN GOROGITZ ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUCALON DEBBIE CARE OF MCGUIRE REAL ESTATE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CENTURY MEDIA NETWORK CO ATTN GOROGITZ ALEXANDER $765.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $793.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CENTURY MEDIA NETWORK CO ATTN GOROGITZ ALEXANDER

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY GORGOVITZ ALEXANDER HEARING SET FOR OCT-28-1991 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
